title: ollama/ollama
summary: The official Go-based CLI and server that lets you pull, run, and manage large language models locally with a single command.
highlights: model library (Llama 3, Phi, Mistral, Gemma, etc.)

title: langchain-ai/langchain (Ollama integration)
summary: LangChain’s Python and JS packages expose an Ollama LLM wrapper so you can swap local models into any chain or agent.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official lightweight Python client for the Ollama API—install from PyPI and talk to local models in 3 lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official TypeScript/JavaScript client for Node, Deno and browsers—same API surface as the Python client.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich ChatGPT-style web interface for Ollama—no API keys required, runs entirely in your browser.

title: ollama-gui
summary: Minimal Tauri-based desktop GUI for Ollama; cross-platform, < 10 MB binary, dark/light themes.

title: chainlit/chainlit (Ollama callback)
summary: Chainlit’s open-source chat-UI framework ships a native Ollama callback—spin up a shareable chat app in minutes.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal reference implementation of retrieval-augmented generation using Ollama + Sentence-Transformers + FAISS.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that turns any Ollama model into a GitHub Copilot replacement—inline suggestions and chat sidebar.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU support and horizontal pod autoscaling.

title: ollama-docker
summary: Official multi-stage Dockerfile (cuda + rocm + cpu) and compose snippets maintained by the Ollama team.

title: private-gpt (Ollama backend)
summary: PrivateGPT v0.5 adds an Ollama backend option so you can run the entire RAG pipeline 100% locally.

title: ollama-cli-chat
summary: Terminal UI (rich + prompt-toolkit) for multi-turn chats with Ollama, includes history search and syntax highlighting.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client library published to Maven Central; integrates with Spring Boot and Android.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration that lets you use Ollama models as generators or embedders in production pipelines.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Community Rust crate providing async bindings to the Ollama REST API—tokio + serde.

title: ollama-cookbook
summary: Curated recipes for common patterns—function calling, JSON mode, vision models, fine-tune adapters, etc.

title: ollama-discord-bot
summary: Self-hostable Discord bot that brings any Ollama model into your server with slash commands and thread support.

title: ollama-nix
summary: Merged NixOS service module and package derivation for Ollama—install with nix-env or enable via configuration.nix.

title: ollama-reddit-community
summary: Active subreddit (40k+ members) for announcements, troubleshooting, and showcase of community projects around Ollama.
